sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1005" key="a)gxibasi/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγχι-βασίη</orth>, <sense id="n1005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμφισβήτησις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1415.tlg001:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
